items.title: # Perfect Resume Summary
items.content: Write a concise, 3‑sentence professional summary for a resume. Include the job title, years of experience, top skill, and a measurable achievement. Make it sound confident and tailored to a marketing manager role.

items.title: # Action‑Verb Bullet Builder
items.content: Create five resume bullet points for a software engineer. Start each with a strong action verb, mention the technology used, and add a result with numbers (e.g., % increase, users served). Keep each bullet under 20 words.

items.title: # Keyword Optimizer
items.content: List the top 10 keywords that an applicant tracking system would look for in a data analyst resume. Include both hard skills and soft skills, and explain briefly how to weave each keyword into the work experience section.

items.title: # Prompt 1
items.content: Create a catchy Instagram caption for a photo of a coffee cup on a rainy morning. Mention the cozy feeling, the smell of coffee, and add a playful emoji. Keep it under 150 characters.

items.title: # Prompt 2
items.content: Write an Instagram caption for a travel selfie in front of a famous landmark. Highlight excitement, a fun fact about the place, and end with a call to action for followers to share their own trips.

items.title: # Prompt 3
items.content: Generate a short, witty caption for a pet photo where the dog is wearing sunglasses. Include a pun, a friendly tone, and a relevant hashtag.

items.title: # Prompt 1
items.content: Create a LinkedIn post announcing a new product launch. Include a catchy opening line, three key benefits, a brief story or statistic, a call to action, and two relevant hashtags. Keep the tone professional yet friendly, and limit the post to 150 words.

items.title: # Prompt 2
items.content: Write a LinkedIn post that shares a personal career lesson. Start with a hook, describe the challenge, explain what you learned, and end with a question that encourages comments. Use simple language, keep it under 120 words, and add one hashtag.

items.title: # Prompt 3
items.content: Generate a LinkedIn post promoting an upcoming webinar on AI trends. Mention the date, speaker name, three topics covered, why it matters to the reader, and a link placeholder. Use an enthusiastic tone, keep it under 130 words, and add two hashtags.
